message:
test(core): add property-based tests for ack/deferred-completion protocol (ft-2p9cb.6.3.3)

16 proptests: AckPhase/CompletionReason/AckToken/Config serde, issue_ack
increments, correlation ID monotonicity, complete removes pending, deferred
latency computation, sweep deadline, completion/timeout rate bounds, reset
clears, issue_ack_checked slow detection, make_progress clamping,
degradation/snapshot serde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
